todo.cannotMerge: You can't merge this item with the previous one because the resulting text exceeds the maximum.
todo.tooManyItems: You can't add any more items. This list is full.
todo.noneToday: You haven't scheduled any to-do tasks for the selected day
todo.presetConfirmationTitle: Are you sure you want to apply the preset titled “{title}”?
todo.presetConfirmationDescription: This will mark all items in the preset as uncompleted or add missing items to the list. This action cannot be undone automatically.
todo.presetTooManyItemsDescription: The resulting to-do list would contain more items than allowed.

meta.title: To-Do
meta.description: Create to-do lists, track your daily to-dos and save or load to-do list presets.

modal.title: Edit To-Do List
modal.description: Check off completed to-dos, add new ones, schedule to-dos or save presets to load again later.
